goal: Build working MVP: Mock all Hilo APIs, build everything else REAL on Cloudflare free tier (Workers + D1 + R2 + KV + Pages). 4 weeks, 68 tasks.
decisions: Stack: Hono (Workers-native) + D1 + Drizzle ORM + R2 + KV
Auth: Mock JWT (swap Haravan SSO later)
PDF: Real render from invoice data, cache R2
Validation: Real engine (MST, tax, NĐ 70/2025 rules)
12 REST endpoints, 7 Portal UI screens, 5 DB tables
first_tasks: 1.1.1 — Init monorepo (pnpm workspace, apps/api + apps/portal + packages/shared)
1.1.2 — Hono + Wrangler setup with D1/R2/KV bindings
1.1.4 — D1 migration: 5 tables (invoices, audit_logs, merchant_config, idempotency_keys, customers)
